title: Unknown Input, Zod 4 Validation, Domain Types, and Output Contracts · Narrowing Workshop
summary: A backend pairing room predicts runtime, request, middleware, dependency, response, and cleanup transitions before assembling the first runtime schema and trusted domain boundary for unknown input, zod 4 validation, domain types, and output contracts. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of runtime schema and trusted domain boundary while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Model body, params, query, fields, configuration, token claims, database rows, and upstream data as unknown until runtime validation succeeds.
Use Zod 4 strict objects, safeParse, issue paths, bounds, unions, refinements, and error mapping without accepting undeclared properties.
Order decoding, validation, canonicalization, authorization, and effect so normalization cannot change the resource or policy target after checks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Unknown Before Validation
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop team handles case 2000 in a partner integration using an older generated TypeScript client. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to admit unknown input through strict runtime and output schemas; preserve one tenant fairness invariant; then saturate one tenant budget while another tenant remains serviceable. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Model body, params, query, fields, configuration, token claims, database rows, and upstream data as unknown until runtime validation succeeds.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Unknown Before Validation.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model body, params, query, fields, configuration, token claims, database rows, and upstream data as unknown until runtime validation succeeds. For Node and Express server Commit to the mission model · Workshop Unknown Before Validation, keep Unknown Before Validation connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Defend the transferred model · Workshop Output Schema Minimization
steps.instruction:
Write the workshop evidence note for Output Schema Minimization: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A workshop team handles case 4431 in a partner integration using an older generated TypeScript client. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to admit unknown input through strict runtime and output schemas; preserve one tenant fairness invariant; then remove one trusted proxy hop and recompute authority from the socket boundary. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Map domain results through explicit response schemas that minimize fields, stabilize nullability, and detect accidental secret or internal-property disclosure.
